message:
test(io): add NumPy .npy format oracle tests for roundtrip, magic bytes, and header parsing

Add oracle tests verifying: f64 and i32 roundtrip through write_npy_bytes/
read_npy_bytes, 2D array with fortran_order roundtrip, magic bytes
(0x93NUMPY) presence, header format version (1.0 vs 2.0), empty array
handling, and boolean dtype roundtrip. All tests construct payloads from
first principles and validate byte-level correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
